ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the flight took place */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the flight took place */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the flight took place */,
  "dep_time" INTEGER /* Actual departure time */,
  "sched_dep_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "dep_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arr_time" INTEGER /* Actual arrival time */,
  "sched_arr_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Airline carrier */,
  "flight_number" INTEGER /* Flight number */,
  "tailnum" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport */,
  "dest" TEXT /* Destination airport */,
  "air_time" INTEGER /* Air time in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance flown in miles */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the flight */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the flight */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (domestic, international) */,
  "flight_manual" TEXT /* Reference to the flight manual */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the cargo in kilograms */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_dest FOREIGN KEY ("dest") REFERENCES airports ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier FOREIGN KEY ("carrier") REFERENCES airlines ("carrier")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Airline carrier code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "code" TEXT /* Airport code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin airport */,
  "dest_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination airport */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the route in miles */,
  "route_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_dest_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "sched_dep_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "sched_arr_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days of the week the flight operates */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "dep_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay (e.g., weather, mechanical issues) */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, flight attendant, air traffic controller, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the user's permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Number of passengers on the flight
Weight of the cargo in kilograms
Current status of the flight (on time, delayed, canceled)
URL of the airline's official website
Contact phone number for the airline
Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet
City where the airport is located

Country where the airport is located
